## Project Submission Checklist

- [ ] I am an active IEEE BUC member
- [ ] The project was presented at an official IEEE BUC Exhibition
- [ ] I have copied the project template
- [ ] `README.md` is fully filled in
- [ ] Source code is included in `/src`
- [ ] No API keys or credentials are committed
- [ ] Files are under 50MB each
